definition.name: Ezif Web Scraper
definition.description: Scrape full websites and return clean markdown content.
definition.toolDefinition: {"name": "scrapeWebsiteEzif", "description": "Scrape a website for content using Ezif", "parameters": { "type": "object", "properties": { "url": { "type": "string", "description": "The URL of the website to scrape" } }, "required": ["url"] } }
